summary: Complete testing of 4 UX fixes for Archer Legal Tech platform. All features verified working: (1) Login redirects to /dashboard with most recent case auto-selected, (2) Empty state shows Archer avatar + welcome text + blue 'Open a new case' button, (3) Archer logo navigates to / on Dashboard and CaseDetail pages, (4) 'My Dashboard' button appears on landing page when logged in (replacing Sign in/Get started).

1_login_redirect_to_dashboard.evidence: After login with test@archer.legal / ArcherPro2026!, URL redirects to /dashboard

2_most_recent_case_auto_selected.evidence: Dashboard shows case with risk score 75 auto-selected. Cases sorted by created_at (most recent first) at line 202 in Dashboard.js. No 'No active case selected' text shown.

3_empty_state_archer_avatar.evidence: Code verified at lines 378-395 in Dashboard.js: Archer avatar (J in blue circle with green dot), 'Welcome. What's your legal situation?' text, big blue 'Open a new case' button with Plus icon. No clipboard icon.

4_archer_logo_dashboard_navigation.evidence: Clicking [data-testid='logo-link'] in Dashboard navigates to / (landing page). Code at line 254 in Dashboard.js: onClick={() => navigate('/')

5_archer_logo_casedetail_navigation.evidence: Clicking [data-testid='logo-link'] in CaseDetail navigates to / (landing page). Code at line 251 in CaseDetail.js: onClick={() => navigate('/')

6_my_dashboard_button_when_logged_in.evidence: [data-testid='nav-dashboard-btn'] shows 'My Dashboard' text when user is logged in. Code at lines 54-57 in Landing.js

7_sign_in_hidden_when_logged_in.evidence: [data-testid='nav-login-btn'] and [data-testid='nav-signup-btn'] NOT visible when user is logged in

8_sign_in_visible_when_not_logged_in.evidence: [data-testid='nav-login-btn'] and [data-testid='nav-signup-btn'] visible when user is NOT logged in

Dashboard.js.line_202: Cases sorted by created_at (most recent first): sort((a, b) => new Date(b.created_at || 0) - new Date(a.created_at || 0))
Dashboard.js.line_254: Logo click navigates to /: onClick={() => navigate('/')}
Dashboard.js.lines_378-395: Empty state shows Archer avatar (J in blue circle), green dot, 'Welcome. What's your legal situation?' text, and blue 'Open a new case' button

CaseDetail.js.line_251: Logo click navigates to /: onClick={() => navigate('/')}

Landing.js.lines_54-66: Conditional rendering: user ? 'My Dashboard' button : 'Sign in' + 'Get started' buttons

Sidebar.js.line_29: Logo click navigates to /: onClick={() => navigate('/')}

critical_code_review_comments: Empty state uses Archer avatar (J in blue circle with green dot) - NOT clipboard icon
Cases sorted by created_at (most recent first) - NOT by risk_score
Logo navigation to / works on Dashboard, CaseDetail, and Sidebar components
Landing page correctly shows 'My Dashboard' when logged in, 'Sign in'/'Get started' when not logged in
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 UX fixes verified: (1) Login redirect to /dashboard with most recent case auto-selected, (2) Empty state shows Archer avatar + welcome text + blue button (no clipboard icon), (3) Archer logo navigates to / on all pages, (4) 'My Dashboard' button on landing page when logged in. All tests passed. The test user test@archer.legal has existing cases, so empty state was verified via code review.
screenshots: .screenshots/landing_not_logged_in.png - Landing page with Sign in/Get started buttons
.screenshots/landing_after_logo_click.png - Landing page after clicking Archer logo
